data.canonicalMethodology: CoinGecko hourly market_chart prices for OHLC and daily total_volumes snapshots for volume

preRegistration.purpose: Data-quality audit before any exchange-volume forecast experiment.
checks: UTC daily close difference versus canonical cache
volume correlation and volume ratio versus canonical volume
preRegistration.promotionPolicy: This audit cannot promote a forecast feature. It can only document whether exchange candles are stable enough to support a separate pre-registered volume-feature ablation.

sources.label: Binance spot BTCUSDT 1d klines
notes: BTCUSDT is a USDT quote market, not BTC/USD spot; close agreement is useful but not a canonical USD replacement by itself.
Volume is quote volume in USDT and is not directly comparable to CoinGecko aggregate USD volume.

sources.label: Coinbase Exchange BTC-USD 1d candles
notes: Coinbase is BTC/USD spot with exchange-specific base BTC volume converted to approximate USD using daily close; it is useful for source-methodology drift checks but not total market volume.

sources.label: Kraken XBT/USD 1d OHLC
notes: Kraken is BTC/USD spot with exchange-specific base BTC volume converted to approximate USD using daily close and may return a limited recent history window.

verdict.summary: At least one source is available, but close/volume agreement is not strong enough to treat exchange volume as model-ready without manual review.
